query:
-- Check reservation 480001
SELECT id, status, channel, productId, productName, amountPaid, paidAt, bookingDate, invoiceId
FROM reservations
WHERE id = 480001;

-- Find the Cableski & Wakeboard product
SELECT id, title, supplierId, supplierCommissionPercent, providerPercent, agencyMarginPercent
FROM experiences
WHERE title LIKE '%Cableski%' OR title LIKE '%Wakeboard%';
